model_details.name: EduPredict AI Student Loan Underwriting Model
model_details.type: Stacked ensemble (XGBoost + LightGBM + CatBoost) + Logistic meta-learner
model_details.task: Binary classification — student loan repayment prediction

intended_use.primary_use: Advisory risk scoring for Indian student education loan applications
out_of_scope: Sole basis for credit denial without human review
Any use without explicit DPDP Act consent

sources: IEEE DataPort: Engineering Graduate Employability (12k Indian students)
NIRF 2024: Ministry of Education Institutional Rankings
Live: Naukri & LinkedIn job APIs (demand consensus)
known_limitations: Repayment labels are synthetic (calibrated to RBI 4.4% NPA)
Field-level salary medians used as proxy for individual income
No real Indian student loan repayment microdata available in training set

fairness.sensitive_attribute: Field of study (proxy for socioeconomic background)
fairness.note: Chouldechova (2017) impossibility theorem: equalized odds and predictive parity cannot both hold when base rates differ. We report both and let the operator choose based on policy.

cgpa_normalized.description: CGPA normalised to [0,1] by dividing by 10

median_salary_normalized.description: Median salary for field, normalised to [0,1]

demand_proxy.description: Normalised job posting count for student's field

demand_velocity_per_day.description: OLS slope of job count over time (jobs/day)

velocity_r_squared.description: OLS fit quality for demand trend (0=noisy, 1=clean)

macro_index.description: India Macro Repayment Index: composite of unemployment, repo rate, CPI, hiring

backlogs_missing.description: Binary indicator: 1 if backlog data was imputed using field median

regulatory_compliance.rbi_free_ai: August 2025 — Explainability via SHAP, Fairness via DPI
regulatory_compliance.dpdp_act_2023: Consent capture implemented, data retention policies defined
regulatory_compliance.adverse_action: Reason codes AA-01 through AA-09 generated for RED tier
